item.title: 曝华为 Mate90 系列将搭载基于「韬定律」的新麒麟芯片
item.guid: 曝华为-Mate90-系列将搭载基于「韬定律」的新麒麟芯片
item.description:
Kechuang Daily quoted sources as saying that Huawei plans to equip the Mate90 series, to be released this autumn, with a new Kirin chip based on the 'Tao's Law'. 科创日报援引知情人士消息称，华为计划在今年秋季发布的 Mate90 系列上搭载基于「韬定律」的新麒麟芯片。

Huawei proposed 'Tao's Law' in May as a development principle for the semiconductor industry. Its core is to systematically reduce the time constant τ, combined with technologies like logic folding, to compress signal propagation delay within chips and increase transistor density. 华为在 5 月提出「韬定律」作为半导体产业发展原则，核心是通过系统性降低时间常数 τ，结合逻辑折叠等技术，压缩芯片内部信号传播时延，提升晶体管密度。

Kechuang Daily stated that the Kirin chip, set to debut in the autumn of 2026, will be the first to adopt logic folding technology, leading to performance improvements. 科创日报称，2026 年秋季面世的麒麟芯片将率先采用逻辑折叠技术，性能会有提升。

item.title: 苹果、博通延长合作至 2031 年，将共同开发 AI 定制芯片
item.guid: 苹果、博通延长合作至-2031-年，将共同开发-AI-定制芯片
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple and Broadcom have reached a new cooperation agreement to jointly develop custom chips and extend their partnership until 2031. 据彭博社报道，苹果与博通已达成一项新的合作协议，双方将共同开发定制芯片，并将合作伙伴关系延长至 2031 年。

Broadcom's 8-K filing yesterday revealed that this cooperation will focus on the ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit) field. These custom chips are expected to be used in multiple future generations of Apple products. Previous reports indicated that Apple is working on dedicated chips for glasses and AI servers. 博通昨日提交的 8-K 文件显示，此次合作将重点围绕 ASIC（专用集成电路）领域展开。这类定制芯片预计将应用于未来多代苹果产品中。此前有报道称，苹果正致力于研发用于眼镜和 AI 服务器的专用芯片。

Currently, Apple is developing its first dedicated AI server chip, codenamed 'Baltra'. This chip is considered an enhanced version of the M5 Ultra and is expected to debut in the Mac Studio as early as this year. 目前，苹果正开发代号为「Baltra」的首款专用 AI 服务器芯片。该芯片被视为 M5 Ultra 的增强版本，预计最快将于今年在 Mac Studio 中亮相。

item.title: 三星第二季度利润预计增长 18 倍
item.guid: 三星第二季度利润预计增长-18-倍
item.description:
According to Reuters, Samsung Electronics is expected to see its operating profit surge more than 18-fold year-on-year in the second quarter of this year, driven by soaring demand for memory chips fueled by the AI boom. 据路透社报道，受人工智能热潮带动的内存芯片需求激增影响，三星电子今年第二季度的营业利润预计将实现逾 18 倍的同比增长。

According to LSEG SmartEstimate data from a survey of 27 analysts, Samsung's operating profit for the second quarter ending June 30 is expected to reach 8.8 trillion Korean won (approximately $6.4 billion). 根据 LSEG SmartEstimate 对 27 位分析师的调查数据，三星在截至 6 月 30 日的第二季度中，营业利润有望达到 8.8 万亿韩元（约合 64 亿美元）。

The significant rebound in performance is mainly attributed to the strong showing of its core semiconductor division. Analysts expect the division's operating profit for the second quarter to reach 4.6 trillion Korean won, turning a profit. 业绩的大幅反弹主要得益于其核心半导体部门的强劲表现。分析师预计，该部门第二季度的营业利润将达到 4.6 万亿韩元，实现扭亏为盈。

In contrast, the mobile business performed relatively flatly. Affected by rising raw material costs and increased marketing expenses, Samsung's mobile business is expected to have an operating profit of approximately 2.2 trillion Korean won in the second quarter, a slight decrease from the same period last year. 相比之下，移动业务的表现则相对平淡。受原材料成本上涨及营销费用增加的影响，三星移动业务第二季度的营业利润预计约为 2.2 万亿韩元，较去年同期略有下滑。

Samsung Electronics is expected to release its preliminary second-quarter earnings brief today and plans to disclose its full financial report later this month. 三星电子预计将于今日发布第二季度初步业绩简报，并计划于本月晚些时候披露完整的财务报告。

item.title: 英特尔上调部分消费级和服务器级 CPU 建议零售价
item.guid: 英特尔上调部分消费级和服务器级-CPU-建议零售价
item.description:
According to Kechuang Ban Daily, Intel has raised the recommended retail prices for some consumer and server-grade CPUs, mainly involving Core Ultra 200S Plus consumer processors, as well as some Xeon 6 and Xeon 8000 series server processors. 据科创板日报消息，英特尔已上调部分消费级和服务器级 CPU 的推荐零售价，主要涉及 Core Ultra 200S Plus 消费级处理器，以及部分至强 6 和至强 8000 系列服务器处理器。

The report mentioned that consumer products saw price increases of about $30 to $50, while server products increased from hundreds to thousands of dollars. Intel responded that the price adjustments stem from regular monitoring of supply chains and related costs. 报道提到，消费级产品涨幅约 30 至 50 美元，服务器产品涨幅从数百美元到上千美元不等。英特尔回应称，价格调整来自对供应链及相关成本的定期监控。

item.title: 优必选回应仿生机器人争议：定位情感陪伴而非人类伴侣
item.guid: 优必选回应仿生机器人争议：定位情感陪伴而非人类伴侣
item.description:
According to The Paper, UBTECH has responded to controversies surrounding its newly launched full-size ultra-bionic humanoid robot U1 series. 据澎湃新闻报道，优必选针对其新推出的全尺寸超仿生人形机器人 U1 系列引发的争议作出回应。

Addressing issues such as short battery life, high pricing, and ethical concerns, UBTECH stated that full-size humanoid robots generally have a battery life of 2 to 4 hours, and the product is positioned for emotional companionship, not as a partner. 针对续航短、定价高及伦理担忧等问题，优必选表示全尺寸人形机器人续航普遍在 2 至 4 小时，且产品定位为情感陪伴而非伴侣。

In response to ethical controversies, UBTECH emphasized that its bionic robots are positioned for emotional companionship and explicitly stated that they are not 'boyfriends, girlfriends, or partners'. To address challenges in technology ethics governance, UBTECH established an Artificial Intelligence and Robotics Technology Ethics Committee on June 30. 在回应伦理争议时，优必选强调其仿生机器人定位是情感陪伴，并明确表示其并非「男友、女友或伴侣」。为应对科技伦理治理挑战，优必选已于 6 月 30 日成立人工智能与机器人科技伦理委员会。

Furthermore, organizations such as the China Humanoid Robot 100 Forum issued an initiative for the healthy and orderly development of the industry on July 4. UBTECH expressed full agreement and firm commitment to this initiative, pledging to integrate relevant compliance requirements throughout the entire product development process. 此外，中国人形机器人百人会等机构于 7 月 4 日发布了行业健康有序发展倡议，优必选对此表示完全认同并坚定践行，承诺将相关合规要求贯穿产品全流程。

Affected by product launches and market sentiment, UBTECH's stock price has been highly volatile recently. After rising nearly 8% on June 30, it fell over 9% on July 2, then surged 17.6% on July 3. As of yesterday's close, UBTECH's stock price had fallen by 10.01%. 受产品发布及市场情绪影响，优必选股价近期波动较大。继 6 月 30 日涨近 8% 后，7 月 2 日下跌超 9%，随后于 7 月 3 日大涨 17.6%。截至昨日收盘，优必选股价跌幅为 10.01%。

item.title: 金山办公回应 WPS 收费争议：免费基础功能不会变收费
item.guid: 金山办公回应-WPS-收费争议：免费基础功能不会变收费
item.description:
Kingsoft Office yesterday issued a statement responding to claims of 'WPS overcharging and betraying users,' stating that WPS's free basic features are continuously increasing and that existing free basic features will not be turned into paid features. 金山办公昨日发布声明，回应「WPS 滥收费、背刺用户」相关说法，称 WPS 免费基础功能持续增加，不会把已有免费基础功能变成收费功能。

The statement also said that in recent years, WPS has streamlined its membership offerings into two categories: Super Member and Grand Member, during which time member benefits have continuously increased, and no existing benefits have been transferred to higher-priced memberships; 声明还称，WPS 近年来把在售会员精简为超级会员和大会员两类，期间会员权益持续增加，未把已有权益转移到更高价会员；

A few high-cost services, such as some third-party services and AI office intelligent agents, will be provided through independent entitlement packages or pay-per-use billing, distinct from WPS member benefits, and will not affect the use of existing free features and member benefits. 少数第三方服务和 AI 办公智能体等高成本服务，会通过独立权益包或按量计费提供，并与 WPS 会员权益区分，不影响已有免费功能和会员权益使用。

item.title: 美光与福特签署车用存储芯片战略客户协议
item.guid: 美光与福特签署车用存储芯片战略客户协议
item.description:
Micron Technology and Ford Motor Company yesterday announced the signing of a long-term Strategic Customer Agreement (SCA), aimed at ensuring a stable supply of storage solutions for the production of Ford's next-generation vehicles. 美光科技与福特汽车昨日宣布签署一项长期战略客户协议（SCA），旨在为福特下一代车型的生产提供稳定的存储解决方案供应保障。

The agreement will focus on ensuring the supply of DRAM memory and storage platforms required by Ford for its next-generation vehicle production. To this end, Micron plans to expand production capacity to support long-lifecycle automotive products and ensure continuous supply for critical production projects. 该协议将重点确保福特在下一代车辆生产中所需的 DRAM 内存及存储平台供应。为此，美光正计划通过扩大产能来支持长生命周期的汽车产品，并确保关键生产项目的持续供应。

It is reported that this strategic agreement is one of the 16 important agreements mentioned by Micron during its Q3 fiscal year 2026 earnings call. Just days before signing this agreement, Micron also reached a similar supply agreement with General Motors. 据悉，该战略协议是美光在 2026 财年第三季度财报电话会议中提到的 16 项重要协议之一。就在签署该协议的数日前，美光还与通用汽车达成了类似的供应协议。

item.title: 宇树科技科创板 IPO 注册生效，有望成为 A 股人形机器人第一股
item.guid: 宇树科技科创板-IPO-注册生效，有望成为-A-股人形机器人第一股
item.description:
Information from the official website of the Shanghai Stock Exchange shows that Unitree Robotics' STAR Market IPO review status changed to "registration effective" yesterday. The China Securities Regulatory Commission officially issued an approval on July 2, agreeing to Unitree Robotics' application for initial public offering of shares. 上交所官网信息显示，宇树科技科创板 IPO 审核状态已于昨日变更为「注册生效」。证监会于 7 月 2 日正式发布批复，同意宇树科技首次公开发行股票的注册申请。

Unitree Robotics' IPO, from its acceptance on March 20 to its registration becoming effective on July 2, took only 104 days, setting the fastest review record since the implementation of the STAR Market's "pre-review" mechanism. As a representative enterprise in the embodied AI industry, Unitree Robotics is expected to become the "first humanoid robot stock" in A-shares. 宇树科技本次 IPO 从 3 月 20 日获受理到 7 月 2 日注册生效，仅历时 104 天，创下科创板「预先审阅」机制落地以来的最快审核纪录。作为具身智能行业的代表企业，宇树科技有望冲击 A 股「人形机器人第一股」。

The prospectus discloses that in 2025, Unitree Robotics' humanoid robot shipments exceeded 5,500 units (pure humanoid, excluding wheeled dual-arm robots), ranking first globally in shipments. 招股书披露，2025 年，宇树科技人形机器人出货量超过 5500 台（纯人形，不含轮式双臂机器人），出货量位居全球第一。

For this IPO, Unitree Robotics plans to raise a total of 4.202 billion yuan, intending to issue no less than 40.4464 million new shares. The raised funds will primarily be invested in four core projects: intelligent robot model R&D, robot body R&D, new intelligent robot product development, and intelligent robot manufacturing base construction. 本次 IPO 宇树科技计划募集资金总额为 42.02 亿元，拟发行新股不低于 4044.64 万股。募资将重点投向四大核心项目：智能机器人模型研发、机器人本体研发、新型智能机器人产品开发及智能机器人制造基地建设。

Among these, the intelligent robot model R&D project plans to invest 2.022 billion yuan, accounting for approximately half of the total funds raised. 其中，智能机器人模型研发项目拟投入 20.22 亿元，约占募资总额的一半。

item.title: 天问二号抵达目标小行星 2016HO3，开始科学探测
item.guid: 天问二号抵达目标小行星-2016HO3，开始科学探测
item.description:
The Economic Information Daily learned from the China National Space Administration that the Tianwen-2 probe, after approximately 400 days and a journey of about 1 billion kilometers, successfully rendezvoused with asteroid 2016HO3 recently, reaching a distance of about 20 kilometers from the asteroid, and began scientific exploration. 经济参考报从国家航天局获悉，天问二号探测器历经约 400 天、行程约 10 亿千米，于近日与小行星 2016HO3 成功交会，到达距离小行星约 20 千米处，并开始科学探测。

During its approach, the probe has obtained asteroid image data. The mission team also used optical navigation data to improve the asteroid's ephemeris, reducing the previously hundreds-of-kilometer-level positional error obtained through ground-based observations to the kilometer level. 探测器在抵近过程中已获得小行星影像数据，任务团队还利用光学导航数据改进小行星星历，把此前依靠地基观测得到的上百千米级位置误差缩小到千米量级。

Tianwen-2 was launched from Xichang on May 29, 2025. It first captured the asteroid on June 6, 2026, performed capture control at a distance of 30,000 kilometers from the asteroid on June 7, and reached a distance of 2,000 kilometers from the asteroid on June 19. 天问二号于 2025 年 5 月 29 日在西昌发射，2026 年 6 月 6 日首次捕获小行星，6 月 7 日在距小行星 3 万千米处实施捕获控制，6 月 19 日到达距小行星 2000 千米处。

Subsequently, Tianwen-2 will continue to conduct more detailed scientific exploration, obtaining information on the asteroid's morphology, material composition, and internal structure, in preparation for sample collection. 后续，天问二号将继续开展更精细科学探测，获取小行星形貌、物质成分和内部结构等信息，为采样做准备。

item.title: 逸文科技完成 1.5 亿美元融资，估值达到 10 亿美元
item.guid: 逸文科技完成-1.5-亿美元融资，估值达到-10-亿美元
item.description: According to TechCrunch, Shenzhen-based smart glasses startup Yiwentec has completed a $150 million Pre-B round of financing, led by Meituan and Tencent, bringing its post-money valuation to $1 billion. Wang Xiaoyi, founder and CEO of the company, stated that Yiwentec is betting on a display-first, camera-less smart glasses approach. 据 TechCrunch 报道，深圳智能眼镜创业公司逸文科技完成 1.5 亿美元 Pre-B 轮融资，由美团和腾讯领投，投后估值达到 10 亿美元。公司创始人兼 CEO 王骁逸称，逸文科技押注的是显示优先、无摄像头的智能眼镜路线。

item.title: 星动纪元完成 10 亿元融资，两个月累计融资 25 亿元
item.guid: 星动纪元完成-10-亿元融资，两个月累计融资-25-亿元
item.description:
According to Investment Community, Xingdong Jiyuan has completed a new round of 1 billion yuan financing. 据投资界报道，星动纪元完成新一轮 10 亿元融资。

This round was led by Chengtong Fund, with participation from multiple state-owned assets including Jiangxi Guokong, Guoyuan Equity, Yufu Zhongxin Fund, and Hangzhou Capital. CICC Renault, Jiukun Venture Capital, Hony Capital, Juntian Capital, and Shenghe Capital followed suit, while existing shareholders such as Houxue Capital, Tsinghua Holdings, and Qianshan Capital continued to increase their investments. 本轮由诚通基金领投，江西国控、国元股权、渝富中新基金、杭州资本等多家国资参与，中金雷诺、九坤创投、弘毅投资、君泰资本、盛赫资本跟投，厚雪资本、清控天诚、千山资本等老股东继续追加。

item.title: 💡 哈佛研究：「AI 原生」初创公司规模缩小 25%，初级岗位正在消失
item.guid: 💡-哈佛研究：「AI-原生」初创公司规模缩小-25%，初级岗位正在消失
item.description:
According to Business Insider, a new study by Harvard Business School and INSEAD shows that AI-native startups are reshaping workplace structures, with smaller, flatter teams and a significant reduction in demand for junior employees. 据《商业内幕》报道，哈佛商学院与 INSEAD 的一项最新研究显示，AI 原生初创公司正在重塑职场结构，其团队规模更小、更扁平，且对初级员工的需求显著减少。

The study analyzed Y Combinator startups and venture-backed U.S. startups between 2020 and 2024. It defined "AI-native startups" as companies that deeply embed AI in both their internal processes (such as assisted programming, sales, and design) and core product functionalities. 该研究分析了 2020 年至 2024 年间的 Y Combinator 初创公司以及获得风投支持的美国初创企业。研究将「AI 原生初创公司」定义为在内部流程（如辅助编程、销售和设计）及产品核心功能中均深度嵌入 AI 的企业。

Data shows that AI-native startups are on average 25% smaller than their non-AI counterparts but have a 13% higher proportion of engineers. Simultaneously, the proportion of junior employees and management in these companies decreased by about 15% each. The study points out that AI is creating a higher demand for expert-level talent, with the proportion of senior employees in AI-native companies being 20% higher. 数据显示，AI 原生初创公司的平均规模比非 AI 同类公司小 25%，但工程师比例高出 13%。与此同时，这类公司的初级员工和管理层比例分别下降了约 15%。研究指出，AI 正在创造更高的专家级人才需求，AI 原生企业中资深员工的比例高出 20%。

These companies tend to recruit male-dominated technical talent from top universities, concentrated in Silicon Valley. Researchers express concern that AI may further concentrate job opportunities among highly educated and skilled groups. If AI tools only accelerate the learning process of existing users, it could further widen the performance gap between employees and entrepreneurs from different backgrounds. 这些企业倾向于招聘来自顶尖学府、集中于硅谷且以男性为主的技术人才。研究人员对此表示担忧，认为 AI 可能将就业机会进一步集中在已具备高学历和高技术的群体中。如果 AI 工具仅能加速现有使用者的学习进程，可能会导致不同背景员工及创业者之间的绩效差距进一步扩大。

item.title: 企业微信发布 AI 录音硬件，主打面对面会议记录
item.guid: 企业微信发布-AI-录音硬件，主打面对面会议记录
item.description:
WeChat Work yesterday teamed up with hardware partners such as Mobvoi, iFlytek, and Deli to jointly launch AI recording devices, extending 'face-to-face chat recording' from a mobile phone function to independent office hardware. 企业微信昨日与出门问问、科大讯飞、得力等硬件伙伴联合推出 AI 录音设备，把「记录面聊」从手机功能扩展到独立办公硬件。

WeChat Work introduced that these devices support one-press recording, stable sound pickup, and long standby time, and the recorded content can enter WeChat Work's 'face-to-face chat' process. Supporting functions include distinguishing speakers through voiceprint recognition, generating face-to-face chat summaries, extracting to-do items, and sharing records with team members. 企业微信介绍，这类设备支持一按录音、稳定收音和长时间待机，记录内容可进入企业微信的「面聊」流程。配套功能包括通过声纹识别区分发言人、生成面聊总结、提炼待办事项，并把记录共享给团队成员。

The new version of WeChat Work also adds a workbench entry for 'face-to-face chat recording' and integrates it with schedule reminders: users can be reminded to start face-to-face chat recording when a schedule begins. Typical scenarios provided by WeChat Work include client visits, recruitment interviews, store inspections, and offline project meetings, with the focus on transforming offline conversations into searchable, shareable, and trackable enterprise records. 新版企业微信还给「记录面聊」增加工作台入口，并与日程提醒打通：日程开始时可提醒用户开启面聊记录。企业微信给出的典型场景包括客户拜访、招聘面试、门店巡检和线下项目会议，重点是把线下对话沉淀成可搜索、可转发、可跟进的企业记录。

item.title: 美团开源万亿参数模型 LongCat-2.0，SWE-bench 跑分超越 GPT-5.5
item.guid: 美团开源万亿参数模型-LongCat-2.0，SWE-bench-跑分超越-GPT-5.5
item.description:
Meituan officially open-sourced its trillion-parameter large model LongCat-2.0 yesterday. This model is the industry's first trillion-parameter large model that uses domestic chips throughout the entire process from training to inference. 美团昨日正式开源万亿参数大模型 LongCat-2.0。该模型是业界首个从训练到推理全流程使用国产芯片的万亿参数大模型。

  • Adopts an MoE architecture, with a total parameter count of 1.6T, approximately 48B activated parameters per token, and supports 1M ultra-long context; 采用 MoE 架构，总参数量达 1.6T，单 token 激活参数约 48B，支持 1M 超长上下文；
  • Equipped with a self-developed LongCat Sparse Attention mechanism to efficiently process long texts; 搭载自研 LongCat Sparse Attention 稀疏注意力机制，以高效处理长文本；
  • Introduces a Zero-Compute Experts mechanism, which can dynamically activate 33B to 56B parameters based on the task. 引入 Zero-Compute Experts 机制，可根据任务动态激活 33B 至 56B 参数。

In terms of performance, LongCat-2.0 is specifically designed for AI agent programming scenarios. Benchmark results show that it scored 59.5 on SWE-bench Pro, surpassing GPT-5.5's 58.6. Additionally, the model also achieved excellent results in tests such as Terminal-Bench 2.1 and FORTE. 在性能表现上，LongCat-2.0 专为 AI 智能体编程场景设计。Benchmark 成绩显示，其在 SWE-bench Pro 上得分为 59.5，超过了 GPT-5.5 的 58.6。此外，该模型在 Terminal-Bench 2.1、FORTE 等测试中也取得了优异成绩。

Regarding domestic computing power adaptation, the model completed pre-training with 35 trillion tokens on a cluster of over 50,000 domestic AI chips. 在国产算力适配方面，该模型在超过 5 万张国产 AI 芯片集群上完成了 35 万亿 token 的预训练。

Moore Threads announced yesterday that it has completed rapid adaptation for LongCat-2.0. Based on the MTT S5000 intelligent computing card and MUSA software stack, Moore Threads achieved stable operation across the entire chain, including model loading, inference engine startup, and key operator optimization. 摩尔线程昨日宣布，已完成对 LongCat-2.0 的极速适配。基于 MTT S5000 智算卡及 MUSA 软件栈，摩尔线程实现了模型加载、推理引擎拉起及关键算子优化等全链路环节的稳定运行。

💻 GitHub: 💻 GitHub：

github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0 github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0

🤗 Hugging Face: 🤗 Hugging Face：

huggingface.co/meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0 huggingface.co/meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0

👾 ModelScope: 👾 ModelScope：

modelscope.ai/collections/meituan-longcat/LongCat-20 modelscope.ai/collections/meituan-longcat/LongCat-20

item.title: Kimi K2.7 Code 接入 GitHub Copilot
item.guid: Kimi-K2.7-Code-接入-GitHub-Copilot
item.description:
Kimi Open Platform officially announced yesterday that GitHub Copilot's model selector has launched Kimi K2.7 Code. Copilot Pro, Pro+, and Max users can gradually select this model in the supported entry points for development tasks such as code generation, code understanding, and debugging modifications. Kimi 开放平台昨日官宣，GitHub Copilot 的模型选择器已上线 Kimi K2.7 Code，Copilot Pro、Pro+ 和 Max 用户可逐步在支持入口中选择该模型，用于代码生成、代码理解、调试修改等开发任务。

The article states that this is the first open-source model integrated by GitHub Copilot. Microsoft's financial report disclosed that GitHub Copilot has accumulated over 20 million users, with more than 4.7 million paid subscribers, covering 90% of the "Fortune 100" companies worldwide. 文章称，这是 GitHub Copilot 接入的第一个开源模型。微软财报披露，GitHub Copilot 已积累 2000 万以上用户，其中 470 万以上为付费订阅，覆盖全球 90% 的「财富 100」企业。

item.title: 腾讯混元 Hy3 正式发布，API 输入价降至每百万 Token 1 元
item.guid: 腾讯混元-Hy3-正式发布，API-输入价降至每百万-Token-1-元
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan officially released and open-sourced Hy3 yesterday. It adopts an MoE architecture with a total of 295B parameters and 21B activated parameters, supporting a 256K context length. Compared to the Hy3 preview released in April, it continues to improve in complex reasoning, instruction following, in-context learning, code generation, and agent capabilities. 腾讯混元昨日正式发布并开源 Hy3，采用 MoE 架构，总参数 295B、激活参数 21B，支持 256K 上下文长度，相比 4 月发布的 Hy3 preview 在复杂推理、指令遵循、上下文学习、代码生成和智能体能力上继续提升。

The Hy3 API has been launched on Tencent Cloud TokenHub, with an input price of 1 RMB / million tokens, an output price of 4 RMB / million tokens, and an input cache hit price of 0.25 RMB / million tokens. Hy3 API 已在腾讯云 TokenHub 上线，输入价格为 1 元 / 百万 token，输出价格为 4 元 / 百万 token，输入命中缓存价格为 0.25 元 / 百万 token。

🔗 Related Reading: Hands-on with Tencent Hy3 Official Version, finally catching up with the "AI Second Half" 🔗 相关阅读： 实测腾讯 Hy3 正式版，这次终于赶上了「AI 下半场」

💻 GitHub: 💻 GitHub：

github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy3 github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy3

🤗 Hugging Face: 🤗 Hugging Face：

huggingface.co/tencent/Hy3 huggingface.co/tencent/Hy3

item.title: 阿里千问升级实时语音识别模型 Fun-ASR-Realtime
item.guid: 阿里千问升级实时语音识别模型-Fun-ASR-Realtime
item.description:
Alibaba's Qwen announced the upgrade of its real-time speech recognition large model Fun-ASR-Realtime, with a single model supporting 16 dialects and 30 languages. The API has been launched on Alibaba Cloud Bailian platform. 阿里千问宣布升级实时语音识别大模型 Fun-ASR-Realtime，单模型支持 16 种方言和 30 种语言，API 已上线阿里云百炼平台。

  • Officially, in 16 dialect recognition tests covering eight major dialect areas, the average character accuracy rate of Fun-ASR-Realtime was 88.62%; 官方称，在覆盖八大方言区的 16 种方言识别测试中，Fun-ASR-Realtime 字符准确率平均为 88.62%；
  • The model's first-word latency is controlled at the hundred-millisecond level, and the streaming recognition accuracy is close to offline levels, supporting seamless multi-language switching; 模型首字延迟控制在百毫秒级别，流式识别准确率接近离线水平，并支持多语言无缝切换；
  • The model has also been optimized for multi-language scenarios in East Asia and Southeast Asia, such as Thai, with a 20% improvement in recognition accuracy. 模型还针对泰语等东亚、东南亚多语言场景优化，识别准确率提升 20%。

item.title: 小米米家桌面照片打印机 2 将于 7 月 13 日众筹
item.guid: 小米米家桌面照片打印机-2-将于-7-月-13-日众筹
item.description:
Xiaomi has launched the Mijia Desktop Photo Printer 2 on Youpin, priced at 699 yuan for the main unit, with crowdfunding starting on July 13. The accompanying 4-inch double-split photo paper and 6-inch 4-color professional photo paper are both priced at 69.2 yuan. 小米在有品上架米家桌面照片打印机 2，机器本体定价 699 元，将于 7 月 13 日开启众筹。配套 4 英寸双拼版相纸和 6 英寸 4 色专业版相纸定价均为 69.2 元。

Compared to the current 1S, the new model primarily upgrades to a 4-color dye-sublimation solution, adding a black K layer; it also supports 4-inch double-split photo paper, various texture laminations, and changes the connection method from Wi-Fi 2.4G to Bluetooth 5.2. Software features include LUT color grading, smart ID photos, and AR dynamic photos, targeting family photos, ID photos, and lightweight image peripheral printing scenarios. 相比现款 1S，新款主要升级为 4 色热升华方案，增加黑色 K 层；同时支持 4 英寸双拼版相纸、多种纹理覆膜，并把连接方式从 Wi-Fi 2.4G 调整为蓝牙 5.2。软件功能增加 LUT 调色、智能证件照和 AR 动态照片，面向家庭照片、证件照和轻量影像周边打印场景。

item.title: CHERRY 推出《蔚蓝档案》联名外设
item.guid: CHERRY-推出《蔚蓝档案》联名外设
item.description:
CHERRY yesterday launched the "Blue Archive" collaboration "Alice Game Time" themed peripheral series, including a wireless mechanical keyboard, wireless mouse, and desk mat, with a starting price of 99 yuan. CHERRY 昨日推出《蔚蓝档案》联名「爱丽丝游戏时光」主题外设系列，包含无线机械键盘、无线鼠标及桌垫，起售价为 99 元。

  • The collaboration keyboard features CHERRY MX Lumina Red switches and an anodized aluminum casing, equipped with a full set of Alice-themed keycaps, including pixel-style Alice replacement keycaps, and a game development department-themed 3D keycap bonus; 联名键盘搭载 CHERRY MX Lumina 红轴，并采用阳极氧化铝制外壳，配备全套爱丽丝主题键帽，随附像素风爱丽丝替换键帽，以及游戏开发部主题 3D 键帽特典；
  • The collaboration mouse features a PixArt PAW3955 optical sensor, weighs 62g, supports up to 8kHz polling rate in wireless mode, has external dimensions of 119×61×38 mm, and comes with an Alice limited flash-bottom badge bonus; 联名鼠标搭载原相 PAW3955 光学传感器，重量为 62g，无线模式下支持最高 8kHz 回报率，外观三维尺寸为 119×61×38 mm，并随附爱丽丝限定闪底徽章特典；
  • The 900×400×4 mm themed desk mat features an ultra-fiber fabric surface, a natural rubber base with an eight-pattern texture, and is edged with 100D high-elastic silk. 900×400×4 mm 主题桌垫，表面采用超纤布料，底部为八字纹理天然橡胶，并辅以 100D 高弹丝包边。

Regarding pricing, the wireless mechanical keyboard is priced at 899 yuan, the wireless mouse at 449 yuan, and the desk mat at 99 yuan. CHERRY also launched a three-in-one peripheral set standard edition, priced at 1499 yuan, with the set additionally including an Alice limited acrylic ornament bonus. 价格方面，无线机械键盘到手价为 899 元，无线鼠标为 449 元，桌垫为 99 元。CHERRY 同时推出了三合一外设套装标准版，到手价 1499 元，套装额外附赠爱丽丝限定亚克力摆件特典。

item.title: 周星驰导演电影《功夫女足》定档 7 月 11 日
item.guid: 周星驰导演电影《功夫女足》定档-7-月-11-日
item.description:
Yesterday, Stephen Chow's directed film "Kung Fu Soccer Girls" released its official poster and is set to premiere on July 11. 昨天，周星驰导演电影《功夫女足》发布定档海报，并定档 7 月 11 日上映。

The film's story combines Shaolin Kung Fu with football elements, revolving around the Chinese women's football team "Emei Team" competing in the AFC Champions League. Previously revealed actors include Zhang Xiaofei, Zhang Yixing, Dilraba Dilmurat, Song Kang-ho, Zhao Lina, Zhang Tianyi, Xu Jiao, etc., with both Zhao Lina and Li Jiayue having women's football experience. 影片故事把少林功夫与足球元素结合，围绕中国女子足球队「峨眉队」征战亚冠杯展开。此前曝光的演员包括张小斐、张艺兴、迪丽热巴、宋康昊、赵丽娜、张天一、徐娇等，其中赵丽娜和李佳悦均有女足经历。

item.title: 《饥饿游戏》前传电影发布特辑，年轻版黑密斯选角正式公开
item.guid: 《饥饿游戏》前传电影发布特辑，年轻版黑密斯选角正式公开
item.description:
According to Variety and Deadline, Lionsgate recently released an official featurette for the latest film in "The Hunger Games" series, "The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping," officially revealing the actor playing the protagonist Haymitch Abernathy. 据《综艺》和 Deadline 报道，狮门影业近日发布了《饥饿游戏》系列最新电影《饥饿游戏：收获日出》的官方特辑，正式披露了主角黑密斯·阿伯纳西（Haymitch Abernathy）的饰演者。

The younger version of Haymitch will be played by newcomer Joseph Zada. This character was portrayed by Woody Harrelson in the original film series and served as the mentor to the main protagonists Katniss and Peeta. 年轻版的黑密斯将由新人演员 Joseph Zada 出演。该角色在原系列电影中由伍迪·哈里森（Woody Harrelson）塑造，是核心主角凯妮丝和皮塔的导师。

This work is adapted from Suzanne Collins' upcoming novel of the same name, to be published next year. The story is set during the 50th Hunger Games, the second "Quarter Quell," 24 years before the first "Hunger Games." 本作改编自苏珊·柯林斯（Suzanne Collins）即将于明年出版的同名小说。故事背景设定在第 50 届饥饿游戏，即第二次「世纪极限赛」，时间点位于首部《饥饿游戏》的 24 年前。
